title: Executive Order 5543—Power-Site Restoration No. 459, Idaho
text:
So much of Executive order of June 27, 1912, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 283, as affects the lands hereinafter described is hereby revoked:
Boise Meridian
T. 9 S., R. 14 E., sec. 11, lot 3.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
January 30, 1931.
